title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON - 211info
text: LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides acute and chronic disease care, immunizations, sports physicals, prenatal care, family planning, reproductive health, and health education. Also provides free books for patients ages 6 months-5 years old through Reach Out and Read at the child's WCC visit. 3896 Beverly Avenue NE Suite 40 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (503) 588-0076 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-0076 Main phone Main (503) 588-0076 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees also available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Medical Care Pap Tests Pediatrics Prenatal Care Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY
